content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "朋友問後續",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "昨天我發生了一件有趣的事情。",
          "pinyin": "Zuótiān wǒ fāshēng le yī jiàn yǒuqù de shìqíng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "zuo2 tian1 wo3 fa1 sheng1 le yi1 jian4 you3 qu4 de shi4 qing2.",
          "translation_en": "Yesterday, something interesting happened to me.",
          "translation_ko": "어제 저에게 재미있는 일이 있었어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "真的嗎？然後呢？",
          "pinyin": "Zhēn de ma? Ránhòu ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "zhen1 de5 ma5? ran2 hou4 ne5?",
          "translation_en": "Really? And then?",
          "translation_ko": "정말요? 그런데요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我在路上看到一隻小狗，然後牠一直跟著我。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zài lùshàng kàn dào yī zhī xiǎo gǒu, ránhòu tā yīzhí gēnzhe wǒ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 zai4 lu4 shang4 kan4 dao4 yi1 zhi1 xiao3 gou3, ran2 hou4 ta1 yi1 zhi2 gen1 zhe5 wo3.",
          "translation_en": "I saw a little dog on the road, and then it kept following me.",
          "translation_ko": "길에서 작은 개 한 마리를 봤는데, 계속 저를 따라왔어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "然後呢？你怎麼做？",
          "pinyin": "Ránhòu ne? Nǐ zěnme zuò?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ran2 hou4 ne5? ni3 zen3 me5 zuo4?",
          "translation_en": "And then? What did you do?",
          "translation_ko": "그런데요? 어떻게 하셨어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我帶牠去商店，買了水給牠喝。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ dài tā qù shāngdiàn, mǎi le shuǐ gěi tā hē.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 dai4 ta1 qu4 shang1 dian4, mai3 le5 shui3 gei3 ta1 he1.",
          "translation_en": "I took it to a store and bought water for it to drink.",
          "translation_ko": "그 개를 데리고 가게에 가서 물을 사서 먹였어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "原來是這樣！後來呢？",
          "pinyin": "Yuánlái shì zhèyàng! Hòulái ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "yuan2 lai2 shi4 zhe4 yang4! hou4 lai2 ne5?",
          "translation_en": "So that's how it was! And later?",
          "translation_ko": "그랬군요! 그다음에는요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "後來牠的主人來了，把牠帶回去了。",
          "pinyin": "Hòulái tā de zhǔrén lái le, bǎ tā dài huí qù le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hou4 lai2 ta1 de5 zhu3 ren2 lai2 le5, ba3 ta1 dai4 hui2 qu4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Later, its owner came and took it back.",
          "translation_ko": "나중에 주인이 와서 데리고 갔어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did A see on the road?",
          "question_ko": "A는 길에서 무엇을 보았습니까?",
          "options_en": ["A cat", "A little dog", "A bird"],
          "options_ko": ["고양이", "작은 개", "새"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of '然後呢' and '後來呢'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell a short story about something that happened to you recently, and let your partner ask '然後呢' or '後來呢'."
    },
    {
      "title": "澄清故事",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我昨天去餐廳吃飯，結果發生了一件奇怪的事情。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zuótiān qù cāntīng chīfàn, jiéguǒ fāshēng le yī jiàn qíguài de shìqíng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 zuo2 tian1 qu4 can1 ting1 chi1 fan4, jie2 guo3 fa1 sheng1 le yi1 jian4 qi2 guai4 de shi4 qing2.",
          "translation_en": "I went to a restaurant to eat yesterday, and as a result, something strange happened.",
          "translation_ko": "어제 식당에 밥을 먹으러 갔는데, 이상한 일이 생겼어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "怎麼了？可以講清楚一點嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Zěnme le? Kěyǐ jiǎng qīngchu yīdiǎn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "zen3 me5 le5? ke3 yi3 jiang3 qing1 chu5 yi1 dian3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "What happened? Can you explain a bit more clearly?",
          "translation_ko": "어떻게 된 거예요? 좀 더 자세히 말해 주시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我點了一份牛肉麵，可是送來的菜不對。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ diǎn le yī fèn niúròumiàn, kěshì sòng lái de cài bù duì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 dian3 le5 yi1 fen4 niu2 rou4 mian4, ke3 shi4 song4 lai2 de5 cai4 bu4 dui4.",
          "translation_en": "I ordered a bowl of beef noodles, but the dish that came was wrong.",
          "translation_ko": "소고기 국수를 주문했는데, 잘못된 요리가 나왔어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "你的意思是，他們送錯了？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ de yìsi shì, tāmen sòng cuò le?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ni3 de5 yi4 si5 shi4, ta1 men5 song4 cuo4 le5?",
          "translation_en": "Do you mean they delivered the wrong order?",
          "translation_ko": "그러니까 주문이 잘못 나왔다는 뜻이에요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "對，我點的是牛肉麵，可是他們送來的是滷肉飯。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ diǎn de shì niúròumiàn, kěshì tāmen sòng lái de shì lǔròufàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, wo3 dian3 de5 shi4 niu2 rou4 mian4, ke3 shi4 ta1 men5 song4 lai2 de5 shi4 lu3 rou4 fan4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I ordered beef noodles, but they brought braised pork rice.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 소고기 국수를 주문했는데 루로우판이 나왔어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "原來如此。然後你怎麼處理？",
          "pinyin": "Yuánlái rúcǐ. Ránhòu nǐ zěnme chǔlǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "yuan2 lai2 ru2 ci3. ran2 hou4 ni3 zen3 me5 chu3 li3?",
          "translation_en": "I see. Then how did you handle it?",
          "translation_ko": "그렇군요. 그럼 어떻게 처리하셨어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我跟店員說，然後他們幫我換了一份。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ gēn diànyuán shuō, ránhòu tāmen bāng wǒ huàn le yī fèn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 gen1 dian4 yuan2 shuo1, ran2 hou4 ta1 men5 bang1 wo3 huan4 le5 yi1 fen4.",
          "translation_en": "I told the staff, and then they helped me exchange it.",
          "translation_ko": "직원에게 말했더니, 교환해 주었어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did A originally order?",
          "question_ko": "A는 원래 무엇을 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Beef noodles", "Braised pork rice", "Chicken rice"],
          "options_ko": ["소고기 국수", "루로우판", "치킨 라이스"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the clarifying questions like '你的意思是' and '然後你怎麼處理'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell a story about a time you received the wrong order, and let your partner ask clarifying questions."
    },
    {
      "title": "繼續故事",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我昨天去公園散步，然後看到一個人在拍照。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zuótiān qù gōngyuán sànbù, ránhòu kàn dào yī gè rén zài pāizhào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 zuo2 tian1 qu4 gong1 yuan2 san4 bu4, ran2 hou4 kan4 dao4 yi1 ge4 ren2 zai4 pai1 zhao4.",
          "translation_en": "I went for a walk in the park yesterday, and then I saw someone taking photos.",
          "translation_ko": "어제 공원에 산책하러 갔는데, 한 사람이 사진을 찍고 있었어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "然後呢？你認識那個人嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Ránhòu ne? Nǐ rènshi nà ge rén ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ran2 hou4 ne5? ni3 ren4 shi5 na4 ge4 ren2 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "And then? Do you know that person?",
          "translation_ko": "그런데요? 그 사람을 아세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "不認識，可是我覺得他拍的照片很好看。",
          "pinyin": "Bù rènshi, kěshì wǒ juéde tā pāi de zhàopiàn hěn hǎokàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 ren4 shi5, ke3 shi4 wo3 jue2 de5 ta1 pai1 de5 zhao4 pian4 hen3 hao3 kan4.",
          "translation_en": "I don't know him, but I think the photos he took were very beautiful.",
          "translation_ko": "몰라요, 하지만 그가 찍은 사진이 아주 예뻤어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "然後呢？你有跟他說話嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Ránhòu ne? Nǐ yǒu gēn tā shuōhuà ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ran2 hou4 ne5? ni3 you3 gen1 ta1 shuo1 hua4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "And then? Did you talk to him?",
          "translation_ko": "그런데요? 그 사람과 이야기했어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "有啊，我問他能不能教我拍照。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu a, wǒ wèn tā néng bù néng jiào wǒ pāizhào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "you3 a5, wo3 wen4 ta1 neng2 bu4 neng2 jiao4 wo3 pai1 zhao4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I asked him if he could teach me to take photos.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 사진 찍는 법을 가르쳐 줄 수 있는지 물어봤어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "然後呢？他怎麼說？",
          "pinyin": "Ránhòu ne? Tā zěnme shuō?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ran2 hou4 ne5? ta1 zen3 me5 shuo1?",
          "translation_en": "And then? What did he say?",
          "translation_ko": "그런데요? 그가 뭐라고 했어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "他說可以，然後我們就一起拍照了。",
          "pinyin": "Tā shuō kěyǐ, ránhòu wǒmen jiù yīqǐ pāizhào le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ta1 shuo1 ke3 yi3, ran2 hou4 wo3 men5 jiu4 yi1 qi3 pai1 zhao4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "He said yes, and then we took photos together.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮다고 해서, 함께 사진을 찍었어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did A ask the person?",
          "question_ko": "A는 그 사람에게 무엇을 물어보았습니까?",
          "options_en": ["To borrow a camera", "To teach how to take photos", "To take a photo of A"],
          "options_ko": ["카메라를 빌리다", "사진 찍는 법을 가르쳐 달라고", "A의 사진을 찍어 달라고"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on the flow of '然後呢' questions to continue the story.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Continue the story: what happened after they took photos together? Use '然後' and '接著'."
    }
  ]
}
